Diff scope is wrong: only `.ddx/executions/20260430T054756-4aa96572/manifest.json` and `result.json` are present. The restyle commit `ff5659be style: restyle overview and node pages` (visible in recent git log) is what should be under review.
Re-run review against `ff5659be` (the `result_rev`) or the merge range that includes it, so the actual token-class swaps, hairline additions, headline scale changes, and Playwright snapshot updates can be graded.
No Playwright artifacts (updated PNG snapshots, test file diffs) are present in this diff to confirm `bun run test:e2e -- --grep 'overview' --update-snapshots` was run.
